name: Z-Tech Mind Control Headset
description:
CW: Hypnosis/Mind Control, CNC

You don't have any recollection of buying this thing. You try to ask yourself what might have happened—maybe you accidentally signed up to be a tester when mindlessly putting in your email somewhere. Maybe someone sent this thing to the wrong address. Or one of your friends sent it to you for the hell of it.

Whatever the reason, it's here, and it's yours. A fancy, new-fangled "Z-Tech Headset."

Though... the box it came in didn't have any instructions, nor any explanation for what it did. You can't really return it now, so it's up to you to use it however you desire to figure out what it's for.

Some notes:

• The bot is made for AnyPOV. Though, there may be some themes of feminization regardless of gender depending on how you interact with the bot.

• The bot is also meant to be very versatile and flexible to your desires. You as the user can either wear the visor, or you can put it on another person.

• At the start, I'd recommend specifying if you live alone or with anyone else, it can help the bot write replies depending on who is present.

• If you'd like to give me feedback or make suggestions for future bots, fill out this google form!
creator: Chamomile-Tea
